title: eriophorum gracile var. coreanum
intro: Eriophorum gracile var. coreanum, also known as the Korean cotton-grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. In traditional herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Eriophorum gracile var. coreanum are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
